title: Squirrel Removal in Kensington, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Kensington, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving homes near Ocean Parkway & Church Avenue. Call today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Kensington home through roof vents or attic spaces? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Kensington, from the tree-lined streets near Prospect Park Southwest to the residential blocks along Church Avenue. Our humane removal methods protect your property while safely relocating these persistent pests.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Brooklyn homeowners, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges Kensington's older brick homes and multi-family dwellings face with squirrel infestations. Our licensed technicians provide same-day service throughout the neighborhood, offering complete solutions from removal to entry-point sealing and attic restoration.
localContext: Kensington's mature trees along Ocean Parkway and its mix of pre-war apartment buildings and single-family homes create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive and seek indoor shelter. The proximity to Prospect Park means squirrels frequently travel through the neighborhood, targeting attics, soffits, and chimneys in homes near Caton Avenue and Ditmas Avenue for nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Kensington typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or damage repair is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Kensington homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Kensington homes through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps in fascia boards, and uncapped chimneys. The neighborhood's older architecture and proximity to tree-heavy areas near Prospect Park make homes particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry during nesting season in spring and fall.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Brooklyn humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-capture traps that safely contain squirrels without harm. We relocate captured squirrels according to New York State regulations and seal all entry points to prevent re-entry, ensuring a permanent solution without cruelty.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Kensington home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Kensington and can typically complete the initial trapping within 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels present. Full exclusion work, including sealing entry points and damage repair, is usually completed within one week of the initial inspection.
